title: 10 best herbal creams for plantar fasciitis
description: Salvia officinalis, also known as sage, creams helps with plantar fasciitis because of its anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties. The active compounds in sage, such as rosmarinic acid and triterpenes, have been shown to reduce pain and inflammation in the affected area. Additionally, sage creams may help to improve circulation and reduce oxidative stress, which can contribute to the development of plantar fasciitis.
